roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/MISDRED1:001/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVSCONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/ARBUCKLE/REMA/DEFT ADV NL:001/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/X:SENTENCING IS DEFERRED FOR A PERIOD OF ONE YEAR IN ORDER FOR DEFENDANT TO OBTAIN NO NEW CHARGES, COMPLETE 40 HOURS OF COMMUNITYSERVICE, MAKE A GOOD EFFORT TO PAY RESTITUTION, AND MAINTAIN OR ACTIVELY SEEK EMPLOYMENT OR SCHOOLING, IF DEFENDANT SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETES  THESE TERMS, THE PLEA SHALL BE WITHDRAWN AND THE PROPOSED COUNT AND SENTENCE IS  TOBE DISMISSED/TWS/CONTD:STATUS OF DEJ/DOP/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
